data.body: AC amendment (gap analysis — state_conflict): Specify RED marker naming convention in .test-index. Use format: [test_name] where test_name matches the test function/section name in the test file. Example: plugins/dso/scripts/sprint-drift-check.sh:tests/scripts/test-sprint-drift-check.sh [test_no_drift] [test_drift_detected] [test_no_file_impact] [test_missing_args]
